title: OmniProject field mapping
description: A shipped CORE field-mapping def (roadmap §4.6). One file per slot under assets/mappings/<id>.json. A slot's rows are read/written/deleted through the generic mapping surface; each field is addressed to a (broker, backend). Methodology-NEUTRAL data plumbing — the agile tag lives on the screen/report surfaces that render a slot, never on the slot itself.

id.description: The slot id (must equal the filename).

label.description: Human label used as the seeded def name.

broker.description: Default home broker for fields with no per-field override (e.g. "builtin").

backend.description: Default home backend (e.g. "sidecar" for the all-in-one store).

joinField.description: The row id column (defaults to the id field's native name).

fields.description: semanticKey → address. A string is the native field name (home = the mapping's broker/backend); an object addresses a specific (broker, backend, field) and optionally the canonical superset key.
